TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Bunun, story: bnNr-pear_Samingaz
TEXT.citation: Sung, L. M., Lily, I., Hsieh, F., & Lin, Z. (2008). Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages. Taiwan Journal of Linguistics, 6(2.).
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @article{sung2008developing,title={Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages.},author={Sung, Li-May and Lily, I and Hsieh, Fuhui and Lin, Zhemin and others},journal={Taiwan Journal of Linguistics},volume={6},number={2},year={2008}}

S.FORM: au aiza tu tas tu hanian macingmut a mazasia tu munghuhuma tu bunun a kudiip siza mas isaicia tu sinsusuaz siukakuun tu sia lasvicia.
S.PHON: au aiða tu tas tu x~χanian maʨiŋmut a maðaɕia tu muŋx~χux~χuma tu bunun a kudiip ɕiða mas isaiʨia tu ɕinsusuað ɕiukakuun tu ɕia l~ɬasviʨia.
S.FORM: au aiza tu tas tu hanian macingmut a mazasia tu munghuhuma tu bunun a kudiip siza mas isaicia tu sinsusuaz siukakuun tu sia lasvicia.
S.PHON: au aiða tu tas tu x~χanian maʨiŋmut a maðaɕia tu muŋx~χux~χuma tu bunun a kudiip ɕiða mas isaiʨia tu ɕinsusuað ɕiukakuun tu ɕia l~ɬasviʨia.
S.TRANSL: 有一天,有一個農夫去摘取他所種的梨子.
One day, a farmer went to collect the pears he had planted.

S.FORM: a tancini saia ah maupacia tu siza mas isaicia tu siukaku.
S.PHON: a tanʨini saia ax~χ maupaʨia tu ɕiða mas isaiʨia tu ɕiukaku.
S.FORM: a tancini saia ah maupacia tu siza mas isaicia tu siukaku.
S.PHON: a tanʨini saia ax~χ maupaʨia tu ɕiða mas isaiʨia tu ɕiukaku.
S.TRANSL: 他自己一個人去收穫的.
He went to harvest them by himself.

S.FORM: aupa kudadaza sia lukis matapul.
S.PHON: aupa kudadaða ɕia l~ɬukis matapul~ɬ.
S.FORM: aupa kudadaza sia lukis matapul.
S.PHON: aupa kudadaða ɕia l~ɬukis matapul~ɬ.
S.TRANSL: 他就那樣一個人上去採集並拿著.
He went up to collect and took the harvest like that.

S.FORM: miliskin saia tu pisialun saicia mapinauaz.
S.PHON: mil~ɬiskin saia tu piɕial~ɬun saiʨia mapinauað.
S.FORM: miliskin saia tu pisialun saicia mapinauaz.
S.PHON: mil~ɬiskin saia tu piɕial~ɬun saiʨia mapinauað.
S.TRANSL: 他要好好的整理漂亮的
He thought, he wanted to arrange them nicely.

S.FORM: mahaishais mazasia tu makuang.
S.PHON: max~χaisx~χais maðaɕia tu makuaŋ.
S.FORM: mahaishais mazasia tu makuang.
S.PHON: max~χaisx~χais maðaɕia tu makuaŋ.
S.TRANSL: 他把不好看的擦乾淨變好看.
He wiped the dust off to make those harvests better.

S.FORM: aizin tu dusa tu kalala maza siniza.
S.PHON: aiðin tu dusa tu kal~ɬal~ɬa maða ɕiniða.
S.FORM: aizin tu dusa tu kalala maza siniza.
S.PHON: aiðin tu dusa tu kal~ɬal~ɬa maða ɕiniða.
S.TRANSL: 已經摘了兩籃了.
There were two basket of the collected ones.

S.FORM: niiang kanahtungan siza a muhnaang saia kudadaza sia lukiscia.
S.PHON: niiaŋ kanax~χtuŋan ɕiða a mux~χnaaŋ saia kudadaða ɕia l~ɬukisʨia.
S.FORM: niiang kanahtungan siza a muhnaang saia kudadaza sia lukiscia.
S.PHON: niiaŋ kanax~χtuŋan ɕiða a mux~χnaaŋ saia kudadaða ɕia l~ɬukisʨia.
S.TRANSL: 還沒結束,他還要再到樹上.
It was not over yet; he climbed up the tree again.

S.FORM: nasiza mas lasvicin.
S.PHON: naɕiða mas l~ɬasviʨin.
S.FORM: nasiza mas lasvicin.
S.PHON: naɕiða mas l~ɬasviʨin.
S.TRANSL: 要採梨子.
He wanted to pluck the pears.

S.FORM: aiza tu tacini bunun maupacia amin tu macingmut anghaib sadu mas isaicia tu sinkuzakuzacin madas mas sidi a mapatangkakaun mas sidicia.
S.PHON: aiða tu taʨini bunun maupaʨia amin tu maʨiŋmut aŋx~χaib sadu mas isaiʨia tu ɕinkuðakuðaʨin madas mas ɕidi a mapataŋkakaun mas ɕidiʨia.
S.FORM: aiza tu tacini bunun maupacia amin tu macingmut anghaib sadu mas isaicia tu sinkuzakuzacin madas mas sidi a mapatangkakaun mas sidicia.
S.PHON: aiða tu taʨini bunun maupaʨia amin tu maʨiŋmut aŋx~χaib sadu mas isaiʨia tu ɕinkuðakuðaʨin madas mas ɕidi a mapataŋkakaun mas ɕidiʨia.
S.TRANSL: 有一個人也一樣早,帶著山羊經過看到他所做的,讓山羊找食物吃.
There was also another person passing with a goat in the early morning. He let the goat find food.

W.TRANSL: 工焦<完成貌>工作=近距.斜格

S.FORM: aupa madaingin a lasvia minlukisdaingazin hai talpataz mais nasiza.
S.PHON: aupa madaiŋin a l~ɬasvia minl~ɬukisdaiŋaðin x~χai tal~ɬpatað mais naɕiða.
S.FORM: aupa madaingin a lasvia minlukisdaingazin hai talpataz mais nasiza.
S.PHON: aupa madaiŋin a l~ɬasvia minl~ɬukisdaiŋaðin x~χai tal~ɬpatað mais naɕiða.
S.TRANSL: 樹變大了,很難採.
The tree grew so big that it was hard to collect.

S.FORM: at aiza uvaaz maupacia tuntanpu amin aupa.
S.PHON: at aiða uvaað maupaʨia tuntanpu amin aupa.
S.FORM: at aiza uvaaz maupacia tuntanpu amin aupa.
S.PHON: at aiða uvaað maupaʨia tuntanpu amin aupa.
S.TRANSL: 然後有一個孩子也那樣騎著單車.
Then there was a kid riding a bike like that.

S.FORM: ah matus'in.
S.PHON: ax~χ matusʔin.
S.FORM: ah matus'in.
S.PHON: ax~χ matusʔin.
S.TRANSL: 天亮了.
It became dawn.

S.FORM: nii tu haipun tu uvaazan hai namasikua mai'aupa amin sia dangian naicia pa tasa daan lahaiban.
S.PHON: nii tu x~χaipun tu uvaaðan x~χai namaɕikua maiʔaupa amin ɕia daŋian naiʨia pa tasa daan l~ɬax~χaiban.
S.FORM: nii tu haipun tu uvaazan hai namasikua mai'aupa amin sia dangian naicia pa tasa daan lahaiban.
S.PHON: nii tu x~χaipun tu uvaaðan x~χai namaɕikua maiʔaupa amin ɕia daŋian naiʨia pa tasa daan l~ɬax~χaiban.
S.TRANSL: 不知道這孩子要去哪裡.他也往他們在的地方因為只有一條路經過.
No one knew where the kid was going to. He went toward where they were because there was only a way.

S.FORM: pan'utung saia sadu tu at aiza isia kalala lasvian supahan.
S.PHON: panʔutuŋ saia sadu tu at aiða iɕia kal~ɬal~ɬa l~ɬasvian supax~χan.
S.FORM: pan'utung saia sadu tu at aiza isia kalala lasvian supahan.
S.PHON: panʔutuŋ saia sadu tu at aiða iɕia kal~ɬal~ɬa l~ɬasvian supax~χan.
S.TRANSL: 他停下來,看到籃子有很多梨子.
He stopped, seeing so many pears in baskets.

S.FORM: sadu saia tu aiza idadaza madaingaz matatapul a.
S.PHON: sadu saia tu aiða idadaða madaiŋað matatapul~ɬ a.
S.FORM: sadu saia tu aiza idadaza madaingaz matatapul a.
S.PHON: sadu saia tu aiða idadaða madaiŋað matatapul~ɬ a.
S.TRANSL: 他看到一個老人在[樹]上面一直採.
He sees that there is an old man plucking.

S.FORM: miliskin saia tu nasiza tu tasa.
S.PHON: mil~ɬiskin saia tu naɕiða tu tasa.
S.FORM: miliskin saia tu nasiza tu tasa.
S.PHON: mil~ɬiskin saia tu naɕiða tu tasa.
S.TRANSL: 他想說要拿一顆.
He wants to take one piece.

S.FORM: ana tan a maun.
S.PHON: ana tan a maun.
S.FORM: ana tan a maun.
S.PHON: ana tan a maun.
S.TRANSL: 試吃.
To try it.

S.FORM: at sahnaan saicia madaignaza sadu tu nasadu saicia.
S.PHON: at sax~χnaan saiʨia madai*naða sadu tu nasadu saiʨia.
S.FORM: at sahnaan saicia madaignaza sadu tu nasadu saicia.
S.PHON: at sax~χnaan saiʨia madai*naða sadu tu nasadu saiʨia.
S.TRANSL: 他再看看那個老人家有沒有看到他.
He looks again to see if the old man has seen him.

S.FORM: nii tu sadu aupa maza madaingaza hai malmananu matatapul nii tu haiap tu aiza bunun inastu lahahaib.
S.PHON: nii tu sadu aupa maða madaiŋaða x~χai mal~ɬmananu matatapul~ɬ nii tu x~χaiap tu aiða bunun inastu l~ɬax~χax~χaib.
S.FORM: nii tu sadu aupa maza madaingaza hai malmananu matatapul nii tu haiap tu aiza bunun inastu lahahaib.
S.PHON: nii tu sadu aupa maða madaiŋaða x~χai mal~ɬmananu matatapul~ɬ nii tu x~χaiap tu aiða bunun inastu l~ɬax~χax~χaib.
S.TRANSL: 沒有看到,因為那個老人很努力抑制採摘,不知道有一個人在地下有人經過
He hasn't, because the old man is plucking industriously, he doesn't know there is somebody passing by below.

S.FORM: maza uvaaza hai miliskin tu at nii a madaingaza hai haiap at antabanun tu iahai tas tu kalalain.
S.PHON: maða uvaaða x~χai mil~ɬiskin tu at nii a madaiŋaða x~χai x~χaiap at antabanun tu iax~χai tas tu kal~ɬal~ɬain.
S.FORM: maza uvaaza hai miliskin tu at nii a madaingaza hai haiap at antabanun tu iahai tas tu kalalain.
S.PHON: maða uvaaða x~χai mil~ɬiskin tu at nii a madaiŋaða x~χai x~χaiap at antabanun tu iax~χai tas tu kal~ɬal~ɬain.
S.TRANSL: 那個孩子想說,反正老人不知道,乾脆拿走一個算了.
The child thought to himself, the old man wouldn't know if I took away one basket.

S.FORM: maupacia tu mudaan saia.
S.PHON: maupaʨia tu mudaan saia.
S.FORM: maupacia tu mudaan saia.
S.PHON: maupaʨia tu mudaan saia.
S.TRANSL: 他就這樣走了.
Then he went on his way.

S.FORM: madas tu tas tu kalala tuntanpu.
S.PHON: madas tu tas tu kal~ɬal~ɬa tuntanpu.
S.FORM: madas tu tas tu kalala tuntanpu.
S.PHON: madas tu tas tu kal~ɬal~ɬa tuntanpu.
S.TRANSL: 他帶了一籃子騎單車走了.
He took one basket and biked away.

S.FORM: madaingaza hai maldauk tu idadaza lukiscia matatapul.
S.PHON: madaiŋaða x~χai mal~ɬdauk tu idadaða l~ɬukisʨia matatapul~ɬ.
S.FORM: madaingaza hai maldauk tu idadaza lukiscia matatapul.
S.PHON: madaiŋaða x~χai mal~ɬdauk tu idadaða l~ɬukisʨia matatapul~ɬ.
S.TRANSL: 那個老人仍然在樹上一直採.
The old man was still harvesting in the tree.

S.FORM: at mudaan uvaaza madiskav tuntanpu aupa binis inhaiapus madaingazcia hai nasinapun.
S.PHON: at mudaan uvaaða madiskav tuntanpu aupa binis inx~χaiapus madaiŋaðʨia x~χai naɕinapun.
S.FORM: at mudaan uvaaza madiskav tuntanpu aupa binis inhaiapus madaingazcia hai nasinapun.
S.PHON: at mudaan uvaaða madiskav tuntanpu aupa binis inx~χaiapus madaiŋaðʨia x~χai naɕinapun.
S.TRANSL: 然後那個孩子就騎著單車快速地跑了,因為萬一被那個老人知道他會被追的.
Then the child quickly rode away on his bike just in the case he was going to be chased once the old man knew.

S.FORM: aiza amin tu tasa uvaaz maupacia amin tu tuntanpu at namaikakuadau saia.
S.PHON: aiða amin tu tasa uvaað maupaʨia amin tu tuntanpu at namaikakuadau saia.
S.FORM: aiza amin tu tasa uvaaz maupacia amin tu tuntanpu at namaikakuadau saia.
S.PHON: aiða amin tu tasa uvaað maupaʨia amin tu tuntanpu at namaikakuadau saia.
S.TRANSL: 還有另一個孩子也是騎單車,好像是要去哪裡.
There was another kid also riding a bike like that, looking like went toward somewhere.

W.TRANSL: 非實現=朝向<重疊>如何=知識詞

S.FORM: pa makuang a daana batubatu hai.
S.PHON: pa makuaŋ a daana batubatu x~χai.
S.FORM: pa makuang a daana batubatu hai.
S.PHON: pa makuaŋ a daana batubatu x~χai.
S.TRANSL: 石頭路不好.
The stone road was bad.

S.FORM: milisikin a minduduaz uvaazan tu bananaz uvaazan tu ai namaimikakuabis minanauazan a miliskin saia tu ai manauaz tu binanauaz hai.
S.PHON: mil~ɬiɕikin a minduduað uvaaðan tu bananað uvaaðan tu ai namaimikakuabis minanauaðan a mil~ɬiskin saia tu ai manauað tu binanauað x~χai.
S.FORM: milisikin a minduduaz uvaazan tu bananaz uvaazan tu ai namaimikakuabis minanauazan a miliskin saia tu ai manauaz tu binanauaz hai.
S.PHON: mil~ɬiɕikin a minduduað uvaaðan tu bananað uvaaðan tu ai namaimikakuabis minanauaðan a mil~ɬiskin saia tu ai manauað tu binanauað x~χai.
S.TRANSL: 那個年輕人在想女生到底要往哪裡?他覺得:「哇!很漂亮的女生!」
The young boy was thinking where the pretty girl was going to. He thought the girl is so beautiful.

W.TRANSL: 非實現=朝向-<重疊>如何=到底=斜格

S.FORM: sakakiivan saicia sadu at nii tu haiap tu aiza hangsia batudaingaz itanangaus.
S.PHON: sakakiivan saiʨia sadu at nii tu x~χaiap tu aiða x~χaŋɕia batudaiŋað itanaŋaus.
S.FORM: sakakiivan saicia sadu at nii tu haiap tu aiza hangsia batudaingaz itanangaus.
S.PHON: sakakiivan saiʨia sadu at nii tu x~χaiap tu aiða x~χaŋɕia batudaiŋað itanaŋaus.
S.TRANSL: 他回頭看,不知道前面有石頭.
He looked back, not knowing there was a stone on his way front.

S.FORM: uni a maza tanpu aupa mahusbu a itanangaus hai pancingkul.
S.PHON: uni a maða tanpu aupa max~χusbu a itanaŋaus x~χai panʨiŋkul~ɬ.
S.FORM: uni a maza tanpu aupa mahusbu a itanangaus hai pancingkul.
S.PHON: uni a maða tanpu aupa max~χusbu a itanaŋaus x~χai panʨiŋkul~ɬ.
S.TRANSL: 因為石頭很重,所以腳踏車撞到後倒了.
Because of the heavy stone, the bike hit it and fell down.

S.FORM: at panuni a isaicia bantas.
S.PHON: at panuni a isaiʨia bantas.
S.FORM: at panuni a isaicia bantas.
S.PHON: at panuni a isaiʨia bantas.
S.TRANSL: 他的腳也撞傷了.
His leg also got hurt.

S.FORM: pancingkul saia idii masasamsam isaicia tu bantas nii tu haiap tu aizaangsia uvaaz amin itandingalancin mapahainan sadu saicia tu mucinkul.
S.PHON: panʨiŋkul~ɬ saia idii masasamsam isaiʨia tu bantas nii tu x~χaiap tu aiðaaŋɕia uvaað amin itandiŋal~ɬanʨin mapax~χainan sadu saiʨia tu muʨinkul~ɬ.
S.FORM: pancingkul saia idii masasamsam isaicia tu bantas nii tu haiap tu aizaangsia uvaaz amin itandingalancin mapahainan sadu saicia tu mucinkul.
S.PHON: panʨiŋkul~ɬ saia idii masasamsam isaiʨia tu bantas nii tu x~χaiap tu aiðaaŋɕia uvaað amin itandiŋal~ɬanʨin mapax~χainan sadu saiʨia tu muʨinkul~ɬ.
S.TRANSL: 他撞倒在那裡,一直揉他的腳,不知道還有其他小孩也在旁邊玩耍,看到他跌倒
He fell down there, keeping rubbing his foot, not knowing there existed other kids playing around and seeing him tripping over.

S.FORM: aupa uvaaza hai miliskin tu ai makaskas adii mabananaz uvaazan at macingmut at maupacia tu at mindangaz aupas madaingaz at masatu tas tu kalala tusia lasvicin isbaliv adus napulumahun.
S.PHON: aupa uvaaða x~χai mil~ɬiskin tu ai makaskas adii mabananað uvaaðan at maʨiŋmut at maupaʨia tu at mindaŋað aupas madaiŋað at masatu tas tu kal~ɬal~ɬa tuɕia l~ɬasviʨin isbal~ɬiv adus napul~ɬumax~χun.
S.FORM: aupa uvaaza hai miliskin tu ai makaskas adii mabananaz uvaazan at macingmut at maupacia tu at mindangaz aupas madaingaz at masatu tas tu kalala tusia lasvicin isbaliv adus napulumahun.
S.PHON: aupa uvaaða x~χai mil~ɬiskin tu ai makaskas adii mabananað uvaaðan at maʨiŋmut at maupaʨia tu at mindaŋað aupas madaiŋað at masatu tas tu kal~ɬal~ɬa tuɕia l~ɬasviʨin isbal~ɬiv adus napul~ɬumax~χun.
S.TRANSL: 然後那個孩子在想:「欸?這個男孩子很勤勞,怎麼那麼早幫老人家運送一籃的梨子去賣還是帶回家.」
The kid was thinking 'Well, this boy was so diligent in getting up early like that to help the elder to take a basket of pears to sell or back home! '

S.FORM: at pancinkul hai indangazan naicia mindia masuhis punsia kalalacia.
S.PHON: at panʨinkul~ɬ x~χai indaŋaðan naiʨia mindia masux~χis punɕia kal~ɬal~ɬaʨia.
S.FORM: at pancinkul hai indangazan naicia mindia masuhis punsia kalalacia.
S.PHON: at panʨinkul~ɬ x~χai indaŋaðan naiʨia mindia masux~χis punɕia kal~ɬal~ɬaʨia.
S.TRANSL: 他們就幫那撞倒的孩子撿起來放到籃子裡.
They helped the tripped kid pick and put back into the basket.

S.FORM: at aupa maupacia naia tu mudaanin tuntanpu amin uvaaza tantatau naia mudaan at.
S.PHON: at aupa maupaʨia naia tu mudaanin tuntanpu amin uvaaða tantatau naia mudaan at.
S.FORM: at aupa maupacia naia tu mudaanin tuntanpu amin uvaaza tantatau naia mudaan at.
S.PHON: at aupa maupaʨia naia tu mudaanin tuntanpu amin uvaaða tantatau naia mudaan at.
S.TRANSL: 然後他們所有的孩子騎單車走了,三個人也走了.
Then all children rode off, the three people also went on their way.

S.FORM: kinkikinuz maza adii bananaz uvaaz sadu tu tamuunga itu uvaazcia hai.
S.PHON: kinkikinuð maða adii bananað uvaað sadu tu tamuuŋa itu uvaaðʨia x~χai.
S.FORM: kinkikinuz maza adii bananaz uvaaz sadu tu tamuunga itu uvaazcia hai.
S.PHON: kinkikinuð maða adii bananað uvaað sadu tu tamuuŋa itu uvaaðʨia x~χai.
S.TRANSL: 跟隨後面的那個男孩子看到,帽子屬於那個孩子.
The boy who is following them sees that the hat belongs to that child.

S.FORM: pangkaukan saicia.
S.PHON: paŋkaukan saiʨia.
S.FORM: pangkaukan saicia.
S.PHON: paŋkaukan saiʨia.
S.TRANSL: 他呼叫他.
He whooed him over.

S.FORM: pan'utung maza.
S.PHON: panʔutuŋ maða.
S.FORM: pan'utung maza.
S.PHON: panʔutuŋ maða.
S.TRANSL: 那個停下.
He stopped.

S.FORM: ansahas kalala uvaaza tupaun saicia tu isuu aupadii tamuungan.
S.PHON: ansax~χas kal~ɬal~ɬa uvaaða tupaun saiʨia tu isuu aupadii tamuuŋan.
S.FORM: ansahas kalala uvaaza tupaun saicia tu isuu aupadii tamuungan.
S.PHON: ansax~χas kal~ɬal~ɬa uvaaða tupaun saiʨia tu isuu aupadii tamuuŋan.
S.TRANSL: 那個小孩子把籃子扛起來,問他說:這個帽子是你的嗎?
The boy lifts the basket, and asks: Is this your hat?

S.FORM: hai manaskal maza adii mabananaza insahan mas kalala hai.
S.PHON: x~χai manaskal~ɬ maða adii mabananaða insax~χan mas kal~ɬal~ɬa x~χai.
S.FORM: hai manaskal maza adii mabananaza insahan mas kalala hai.
S.PHON: x~χai manaskal~ɬ maða adii mabananaða insax~χan mas kal~ɬal~ɬa x~χai.
S.TRANSL: 那個搬過籃子的男生很開心.
The boyu is happy, and takes the basket.

S.FORM: masaiv naicia tu tacinicini bunun satatasa mas lasvicia.
S.PHON: masaiv naiʨia tu taʨiniʨini bunun satatasa mas l~ɬasviʨia.
S.FORM: masaiv naicia tu tacinicini bunun satatasa mas lasvicia.
S.PHON: masaiv naiʨia tu taʨiniʨini bunun satatasa mas l~ɬasviʨia.
S.TRANSL: 他給他們一人一個梨子來吃.
He gives each person a pear to eat.

S.FORM: at maza tatau uvaaza hai nii aupa haiap tu ka sintanghaiu aupa saicia saia hai.
S.PHON: at maða tatau uvaaða x~χai nii aupa x~χaiap tu ka ɕintaŋx~χaiu aupa saiʨia saia x~χai.
S.FORM: at maza tatau uvaaza hai nii aupa haiap tu ka sintanghaiu aupa saicia saia hai.
S.PHON: at maða tatau uvaaða x~χai nii aupa x~χaiap tu ka ɕintaŋx~χaiu aupa saiʨia saia x~χai.
S.TRANSL: 那三個人不知道這個[梨子]是偷來的.
And the three children didn't know they were stolen.

S.FORM: a manaskal a naia antala.
S.PHON: a manaskal~ɬ a naia antal~ɬa.
S.FORM: a manaskal a naia antala.
S.PHON: a manaskal~ɬ a naia antal~ɬa.
S.TRANSL: 他們很高興地收到.
They gladly accepted it.

S.FORM: a mudaan naia.
S.PHON: a mudaan naia.
S.FORM: a mudaan naia.
S.PHON: a mudaan naia.
S.TRANSL: 他們走了.
They went on their way.

S.FORM: manaskal miliskin tu uninangin aiza nakaunun lasvian kakaunun naicia tundadaan.
S.PHON: manaskal~ɬ mil~ɬiskin tu uninaŋin aiða nakaunun l~ɬasvian kakaunun naiʨia tundadaan.
S.FORM: manaskal miliskin tu uninangin aiza nakaunun lasvian kakaunun naicia tundadaan.
S.PHON: manaskal~ɬ mil~ɬiskin tu uninaŋin aiða nakaunun l~ɬasvian kakaunun naiʨia tundadaan.
S.TRANSL: 他們很開心地邊走邊吃.
They happily ate while walking.

S.FORM: mai'aupa amin sia daan tu nalahaiban naicia.
S.PHON: maiʔaupa amin ɕia daan tu nal~ɬax~χaiban naiʨia.
S.FORM: mai'aupa amin sia daan tu nalahaiban naicia.
S.PHON: maiʔaupa amin ɕia daan tu nal~ɬax~χaiban naiʨia.
S.TRANSL: 往他們要走的路的方向.
They are going along.

S.FORM: kanahtungin maza madaingaza siza mas lasvi aupa matmuzin isian sia kulincia.
S.PHON: kanax~χtuŋin maða madaiŋaða ɕiða mas l~ɬasvi aupa matmuðin iɕian ɕia kul~ɬinʨia.
S.FORM: kanahtungin maza madaingaza siza mas lasvi aupa matmuzin isian sia kulincia.
S.PHON: kanax~χtuŋin maða madaiŋaða ɕiða mas l~ɬasvi aupa matmuðin iɕian ɕia kul~ɬinʨia.
S.TRANSL: 老人結束採梨子,因為他的口袋滿了.
The old man finishes plucking pears, because his pockets are full.

S.FORM: na tutuun saicia punsian sia kalala hai ai? cinliskin saia tu matu isuka tasa.
S.PHON: na tutuun saiʨia punɕian ɕia kal~ɬal~ɬa x~χai ai? ʨinl~ɬiskin saia tu matu isuka tasa.
S.FORM: na tutuun saicia punsian sia kalala hai ai? cinliskin saia tu matu isuka tasa.
S.PHON: na tutuun saiʨia punɕian ɕia kal~ɬal~ɬa x~χai ai? ʨinl~ɬiskin saia tu matu isuka tasa.
S.TRANSL: 他要倒在籃子裡面的時候,他想,為什麼少了一個?
When he wants to put in the basket, he thinks, how come one is missing?

S.FORM: nii saia haiap tu viatu isuka nii tu ta'aza bunun tu ansahan at.
S.PHON: nii saia x~χaiap tu viatu isuka nii tu taʔaða bunun tu ansax~χan at.
S.FORM: nii saia haiap tu viatu isuka nii tu ta'aza bunun tu ansahan at.
S.PHON: nii saia x~χaiap tu viatu isuka nii tu taʔaða bunun tu ansax~χan at.
S.TRANSL: 他也不知道怎麼會突然不見了,也沒聽到有人搬走
He doesn't know how it's nowhere to be found, and didn't hear anyone pass by.

S.FORM: tantatau uvaaza lahaib masan mamaun mas lasvi.
S.PHON: tantatau uvaaða l~ɬax~χaib masan mamaun mas l~ɬasvi.
S.FORM: tantatau uvaaza lahaib masan mamaun mas lasvi.
S.PHON: tantatau uvaaða l~ɬax~χaib masan mamaun mas l~ɬasvi.
S.TRANSL: 三個孩子經過都在吃梨子.
Three children are passing by, all of them eating pears.

S.FORM: at miliskin tu madaingazan tu mais naitan siza hai ana aiza aupa kalala ansahanun hai.
S.PHON: at mil~ɬiskin tu madaiŋaðan tu mais naitan ɕiða x~χai ana aiða aupa kal~ɬal~ɬa ansax~χanun x~χai.
S.FORM: at miliskin tu madaingazan tu mais naitan siza hai ana aiza aupa kalala ansahanun hai.
S.PHON: at mil~ɬiskin tu madaiŋaðan tu mais naitan ɕiða x~χai ana aiða aupa kal~ɬal~ɬa ansax~χanun x~χai.
S.TRANSL: 那個老人想,如果是他們偷的話,他們會有搬一個籃子.
Then the old man thinks, if they were the thieves, they would have a basket.

S.FORM: a miliskin saia tu naaiza aupa tanghaiu hai nii tu mahtu tupa mas uvaazcia tu minaun.
S.PHON: a mil~ɬiskin saia tu naaiða aupa taŋx~χaiu x~χai nii tu max~χtu tupa mas uvaaðʨia tu minaun.
S.FORM: a miliskin saia tu naaiza aupa tanghaiu hai nii tu mahtu tupa mas uvaazcia tu minaun.
S.PHON: a mil~ɬiskin saia tu naaiða aupa taŋx~χaiu x~χai nii tu max~χtu tupa mas uvaaðʨia tu minaun.
S.TRANSL: 他想,是不是因為有[人]偷走嗎?也不能對孩子說,是你們吃的嗎?
He thinks, isn't this what was stolen, but I can't tell the children, is that what you are eating?
